name: git-workflow push-timing recommendation warns when there are uncommitted changes in the working tree
command: mkdir -p repo && (cd repo && git init -q && git -c user.email=x@y -c user.name=x commit -q --allow-empty -m init && touch dirty.txt) && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/skills/git-workflow/recommend.sh" --root repo --check push-timing 2>out.txt && grep -q 'warning=uncommitted-changes' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
